Name: FAssetData
Description:
A struct to hold important information about an assets found by the Asset Registry
  This struct is transient and should never be serialized

Variables.Name: ObjectPath
Variables.Description: The object path for the asset in the form PackageName.AssetName. Only top level objects in a package can have AssetData

Variables.Name: PackageName
Variables.Description: The name of the package in which the asset is found, this is the full long package name such as GamePathPackage

Variables.Name: PackagePath
Variables.Description: The path to the package in which the asset is found, this is GamePath with the Package stripped off

Variables.Name: AssetName
Variables.Description: The name of the asset without the package

Variables.Name: AssetClass
Variables.Description: The name of the asset's class
